fields.label: Contract Info (red text)
fields.notes: Red text top-right: 'This scope is under contract: [Client] - [Contract Type] - [End Date]'. Derived from contract FK.

fields.label: Turn Around Time
fields.notes: Displayed as 'Turn Around Time: X days'. Calculated from dtDateIn.

fields.label: Lead Time
fields.sqlColumn: DATEDIFF from delivery method days required
fields.notes: Displayed as 'Lead Time: X days'. Derived from tblDeliveryMethod.nDaysRequired or similar.

fields.label: Repair Level
fields.notes: Displayed as label 'Repair Level: Major'. FK join not confirmed — may be derived from repair items or set directly.

fields.label: Repair Reason
fields.notes: Dropdown values from tblRepairReasons. Example: 'Air/Water System- Clogged Nozzle/Channel'. Column lRepairReasonKey confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Pricing Category
fields.notes: Repair-level override of client pricing category. Example: 'Hospital Active Standard'. Column lPricingCategoryKey confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Sales Rep
fields.notes: Repair-level sales rep. Column lSalesRepKey confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Distributor
fields.notes: Column lDistributorKey confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Delivery Method
fields.notes: Example: 'United Parcel Service'. Column lDeliveryMethodKey confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Shipping Amount
fields.notes: Column confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: P.O. #
fields.notes: Column sPurchaseOrder confirmed in schema dump.

fields.label: Contract (next to PO)
fields.notes: Read-only label showing 'Contract' when repair is under contract. Column sContractNumber on tblRepair.

fields.label: Rack #
fields.notes: Column is sRackPosition (NOT sRackLocation). Schema confirmed.

fields.label: Required Rework
fields.notes: Checkbox + dropdown for rework tech. Related: lReworkTech FK, mCommentsRework memo.

fields.label: Rework Tech (dropdown next to Required Rework)
fields.notes: Column lReworkTech confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Out Sourced
fields.notes: Checkbox bOutsourced + dropdown for vendor (lVendorKey). Example vendor: 'Total Scope South'.

fields.label: Outsource Vendor (dropdown next to Out Sourced)
fields.notes: FK lVendorKey confirmed on tblRepair. Table name tblVendor not confirmed in schema dump.

fields.label: Out Source Cost
fields.notes: Column confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Sales Tax
fields.notes: Column lSalesTaxKey and nSalesTax both on tblRepair. Dropdown with '<None>' option.

fields.label: PS3
fields.notes: Column sPS3 confirmed. Also sPS3Out for outgoing PS3.

fields.label: Loaner Requested
fields.notes: Column confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Max Charge
fields.notes: Column mMaxCharge confirmed. Override button sets lUserKey_MaxChargeOverride.

fields.label: Max Charge Override User
fields.notes: Set when Override button clicked. Column confirmed.

fields.label: Days Last In
fields.notes: Column nDaysSinceLastIn confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Avg. Daily Uses
fields.notes: Column nAverageDailyUses confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Old Expected Delivery Date
fields.notes: Column sExpDelDate (string format) confirmed. Separate from dtExpDelDate.

fields.label: Expected Delivery Date From
fields.notes: Column dtExpDelDateFrom confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Expected Delivery Date To
fields.notes: Column dtExpDelDateTo confirmed on tblRepair.

fields.label: Flags Grid (inherited from client)
fields.sqlColumn: sFlag, lFlagTypeKey, bVisibleOnDI, bVisibleOnBlank + additional visibility columns
fields.notes: Read-only on repairs. Columns: Type (owner level), Locations (D&I/Req/Approval/Invoice — comma-joined visibility bits), Flag (sFlag text). Rows expandable. Same data as clients_flag_* fields. Additional location bits beyond bVisibleOnDI/bVisibleOnBlank likely: bVisibleOnReq, bVisibleOnApproval, bVisibleOnInvoice.

fields.label: Package Type
fields.notes: Both sShipPackageTypeKey and lPackageTypeKey exist on tblRepair.

fields.label: Closed Repair
fields.notes: 'Y' = closed.

fields.label: Bill (Customer/Distributor)
fields.notes: Radio: 'Customer' or 'Distributor'.

fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.notes: Example: 'Due Upon Receipt'.

fields.label: Bill Type (Address/Email checkboxes)
fields.notes: Bitmask or int flag controlling whether bill goes to address, email, or both.

fields.label: Repair Items Grid
fields.notes: Grid columns: Description (tblRepairItem.sRepairItemDesc), UA/NWT, Approved (Y/N), W/N/C/A, Amount, Tech1, Tech2, Primary, Points, Comments. All on tblRepairItemTran except Description from tblRepairItem.

fields.label: Inventory Lot Grid
fields.sqlColumn: Lot Number, Quantity, Item Description, Size, Posted
fields.notes: Grid: Lot Number, Quantity, Item Description, Size, Posted (Y/N). Footer: Add (Lot Number + Quantity inputs), Clear, Post buttons.

fields.label: Status Audit Trail Grid
fields.notes: Read-only audit log. Events: Scope In, In Proc (D&I), In Proc (Dtl Add), Update Slip Printed, In Proc (Req Apr), Requisition Emailed, Repair Amended, Scope Out, Delivered, etc.

fields.label: Documents Grid
fields.notes: Radio filter: Incoming/Outgoing/Paperwork. Grid: Document, Date Uploaded, Rename/View/Remove buttons. Buttons: Capture, Add. Document types include Label, D&I, Update Slip, Blank Inspection, Inventory Pick List, Amendment, Invoice, UPS Proof of Delivery.

fields.label: Points Grid
fields.sqlColumn: User, Scope In, Req Approval, Blank Inspection, Final Inspection, Final Insp. Entry
fields.notes: Radio filter: Operations / Technicians. Aggregated workflow point counts per user for this repair. Likely calculated from status audit trail.

fields.label: Pickup Required
fields.notes: Values: Yes/No.

fields.label: Loaner Provided
fields.notes: Values: Yes/No.

fields.label: Defect Items Checklist
fields.sqlColumn: Leak Test, Control Buttons, Image, Video Functions, Angulation, Variable Function, Other
fields.notes: Storage mechanism not confirmed — could be bit flags on tblRepair or rows in a child table.

fields.label: Complaint/Non-Conformance Form
fields.sqlColumn: Date Received, Received By, Method of Receipt, Issue, Instructions, Resp Mgr, Date Assigned, Date Resp Due, Date of Evaluation, Evaluator, Evaluation Results, Conclusion, Impact on Product, Action, Reviewed By QA (x2), Date of Review (x2), Verification of Effectiveness
fields.notes: Full ISO 13485 complaint/NCR form. Likely stored in dedicated child table rather than tblRepair. Method of Receipt radio: Phone/Letter/Sales/Evaluation/Visit/Other.

fields.label: Available Reports
fields.notes: Print/email reports: Amendment Form, Defect Tracking, D&I, Inspection Blank, Inspection Completed, Inspection History, Inventory Pick List, Invoice, Invoice Reprint, Invoices Past Due, Outstanding Invoices, Outstanding Loaner Scopes, Repair History, Requisition for Approval, Return Verification.

fields.label: Urgent/Hot List
fields.notes: Not visible on In tab but used in list view. Column bHotList.

fields.label: Tech (Primary)
fields.notes: Shown in list view, set via Inspection dialog.

fields.label: Status
fields.notes: Shown in list view, updated by workflow actions.

fields.label: Days In
fields.notes: Shown in list view.
